items.title: Anyone has High CPU spikes like this? AGH in docker, linked to Home assistant and less than 20 devices at home.
items.author: /u/jsixface

items.title: Response time quirk or change?
items.author: /u/NYFLNCTN
items.content: I updated both of my AGH servers the other day to the latest version and I have noticed an interesting change. In the query logs the response times are being rounded up or down. Where I used to see Cache hits like .20ms now I see 0ms.
